'''tagodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:vacutome|vacutome]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-g-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vacutome|vacutome]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| tagodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tægedheth|tægedheth]] || [[word:tægedhej|tægedhej]] || [[word:tægedhesh|tægedhesh]] || [[word:tægedhe|tægedhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tagogodhoth|tagogodhoth]] || [[word:tagogodhoj|tagogodhoj]] || [[word:tagogodhosh|tagogodhosh]] || [[word:tagogodho|tagogodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tagodhoth|tagodhoth]] || [[word:tagodhoj|tagodhoj]] || [[word:tagodhosh|tagodhosh]] || [[word:tagodho|tagodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tagofdhoth|tagofdhoth]] || [[word:tagofdhoj|tagofdhoj]] || [[word:tagofdhosh|tagofdhosh]] || [[word:tagofdhof|tagofdhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tagodhotho|tagodhotho]] || [[word:tagodhojo|tagodhojo]] || [[word:tagodhosho|tagodhosho]] || [[word:tagodhoko|tagodhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tagodhoth|tagodhoth]] || [[word:tagodhoj|tagodhoj]] || [[word:tagodhosh|tagodhosh]] || [[word:tagodho|tagodho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tagodhothol|tagodhothol]] || [[word:tagodhojol|tagodhojol]] || [[word:tagodhoshol|tagodhoshol]] || [[word:tagodhokol|tagodhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tagodhothotho|tagodhothotho]] || [[word:tagodhojojo|tagodhojojo]] || [[word:tagodhoshosho|tagodhoshosho]] || [[word:tagodhoko|tagodhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tagodhothon|tagodhothon]] || [[word:tagodhojon|tagodhojon]] || [[word:tagodhoshon|tagodhoshon]] || [[word:tagodhokon|tagodhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tagodhothoro|tagodhothoro]] || [[word:tagodhojoro|tagodhojoro]] || [[word:tagodhoshoro|tagodhoshoro]] || [[word:tagodhokoro|tagodhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
